entities.name: NCT03548935
entities.context: STEP 1 trial (NCT03548935): Phase 3 interventional study of semaglutide in overweight or obesity

attributes.descriptive_title: Research Study Investigating How Well Semaglutide Works in People Suffering From Overweight or Obesity

entities.name: Phase 3
entities.context: Phase: PHASE3 as stated in the trial record

entities.name: Novo Nordisk A/S
entities.context: Lead Sponsor: Novo Nordisk A/S

entities.name: semaglutide
entities.context: Semaglutide (a new medicine) evaluated as experimental treatment for overweight/obesity; subcutaneous injection once weekly, dose escalation to 2.4 mg

entities.name: Semaglutide s.c. 2.4 mg once weekly
entities.context: Experimental arm: Participants will receive semaglutide for 68 weeks; dose escalation to 2.4 mg from week 17 to week 68

entities.name: Placebo (semaglutide)
entities.context: Placebo comparator arm: Participants will receive semaglutide matching placebo s.c. injection once-weekly for 68 weeks

entities.name: Arm: Semaglutide s.c. 2.4 mg once weekly
entities.context: Experimental arm: Participants receive semaglutide for 68 weeks

entities.name: Arm: Semaglutide placebo
entities.context: Placebo comparator arm: Participants receive semaglutide matching placebo for 68 weeks

entities.name: Overweight or Obesity
entities.context: Conditions: Overweight or Obesity; participants with BMI ≥30 or ≥27 with weight-related comorbidities

attributes.inclusion_criteria: BMI ≥30 kg/m2 or ≥27 kg/m2 with hypertension, dyslipidaemia, obstructive sleep apnoea, or cardiovascular disease

entities.name: Metabolism and Nutrition Disorder
entities.context: Conditions listed in trial record: Metabolism and Nutrition Disorder

entities.name: Adults with overweight or obesity eligible for STEP 1
entities.context: Male or female, age ≥18 years, BMI ≥30 or ≥27 with weight-related comorbidity, history of unsuccessful dietary effort to lose weight; HbA1c <48 mmol/mol

entities.name: change in body weight (%)
entities.context: Primary endpoint: Change in body weight (%) from baseline (week 0) to week 68

entities.name: proportion achieving ≥5% body weight reduction
entities.context: Primary endpoint: Number of participants who achieved weight loss ≥5% at week 68

entities.name: proportion achieving ≥10% body weight reduction
entities.context: Secondary endpoint: Subjects who achieve 10 or more percent body weight reduction at week 68

entities.name: proportion achieving ≥15% body weight reduction
entities.context: Secondary endpoint: Participants who achieve 15 or more percent body weight reduction at week 68

entities.name: proportion achieving ≥20% body weight reduction
entities.context: Secondary endpoint: Participants who achieve 20 or more percent body weight reduction at week 68

entities.name: change in waist circumference (cm)
entities.context: Secondary endpoint: Change in waist circumference (cm) from baseline to week 68

entities.name: change in systolic blood pressure (mmHg)
entities.context: Secondary endpoint: Change in systolic blood pressure (mmHg) from baseline to week 68

entities.name: change in SF-36 score
entities.context: Secondary endpoint: Change in Short Form 36 (SF-36) from baseline to week 68

entities.name: change in IWQoL-Lite for CT score
entities.context: Secondary endpoint: Change in Impact of Weight on Quality of Life-Lite for Clinical Trial (IWQoL-Lite for CT) Score from baseline to week 68

entities.name: change in body weight (kg)
entities.context: Secondary endpoint: Change in body weight (kg) from baseline to week 68

entities.name: change in BMI (kg/m2)
entities.context: Secondary endpoint: Change in body mass index (BMI) (kg/m2) from baseline to week 68

entities.name: change in HbA1c (%)
entities.context: Secondary endpoint: Change in HbA1c (%) from baseline to week 68

entities.name: HbA1c
entities.context: HbA1c ≥48 mmol/mol (6.5%) used as exclusion criterion; also assessed as secondary outcome

entities.name: BMI
entities.context: BMI ≥30 kg/m2 or ≥27 kg/m2 with comorbidity used as inclusion criterion; also assessed as secondary outcome

attributes.use: Patient selection (inclusion criterion) and secondary outcome

Placebo comparator arm: Participants will receive semaglutide matching placebo for 68 weeks

Semaglutide evaluated for treatment of overweight or obesity in STEP 1

Primary endpoint: Number of participants who achieved weight loss ≥5% at week 68

Secondary endpoint: Participants who achieve 20 or more percent body weight reduction at week 68

Secondary endpoint: Change in Short Form 36 (SF-36) from baseline to week 68
